headline.primary_headline: Loose Saggy Neck Skin - Can Any Cream Cure Turkey Neck?
headline.promise_compression: Reader asks embarrassing question, expert provides solution

curiosity_architecture.incomplete_pattern: Is there actually a cream that works for turkey neck?
curiosity_architecture.resolution_promise: Yes - Dermagist Neck Restoration Cream with stem cells

schema_analysis.existing_schema: Turkey neck requires surgery - creams don't work
schema_analysis.new_schema: Swiss apple stem cells can regenerate neck skin like surgery alternative

headline.vsl_adaptation: If your grandkids call it 'turkey neck' and you've tried creams that don't work... there's finally one with Swiss apple stem cells that does

lead.opening_verbatim: DEAR DORRIS: I'm a woman who is 64 years young who suffers from really loose skin under my chin and on my lower neck. I hate the term, but my grandkids say I have 'turkey neck' and frankly, I've had enough of it! I have tried some creams designed to help tighten and firm that loose, saggy skin, but they did not work. Is there any cream out there that can truly help my loose neck skin? - Turkey Neck, Tulsa, OK
lead.hook_mechanism: Relatable reader question with embarrassing family truth
lead.transition_to_body: DEAR TURKEY-NECK: In fact, there is a very potent cream...

mechanism.mechanism_description: Stem cells from Malus Domesticus (special Swiss apple) are 'unprogrammed cells' that can mimic young skin cells that stay tight, firm, and wrinkle-free. Combined with instant lifting ingredient and deep moisturizers for three-pronged approach.
mechanism.stem_cell_explanation: These stem cells are actually unprogrammed cells that can mimic those of young skin that stays tight, firm and wrinkle free

proof_elements.verbatim: Stem Cells taken from Malus Domesticus, a special apple from Switzerland
Oh, I almost forgot… I was given a promo code when I placed my order that gave me 11% off

answer_content.product_introduction: There is a very potent cream on the market that firms, tightens and regenerates new skin cells on the neck area. It is called the Dermagist Neck Restoration Cream.
answer_content.mechanism_explanation: This cream contains an instant lifting ingredient that tightens the skin naturally, as well as deep moisturizing ingredients to firm the skin and make it more supple. Amazingly, the Dermagist Neck Restoration Cream also has Stem Cells taken from Malus Domesticus, a special apple from Switzerland. These stem cells are actually unprogrammed cells that can mimic those of young skin that stays tight, firm and wrinkle free.
answer_content.positioning: As an alternative to the scary surgeries or face lifts that many people resort to, this cream really packs a big punch on the loose saggy skin of the neck.

offer.cta: Available online at Dermagist.com or call toll-free 888-771-5355

extraction_notes.quality_assessment: Clever native advertising format with strong problem framing
notable_elements: USA Weekend placement - mass reach Sunday supplement

'Turkey Neck, Tulsa, OK' signature adds authenticity
Promo code insertion as personal recommendation
extraction_notes.key_insight: The advice column format transforms advertising into trusted recommendation - 'Dorris' becomes proxy for the reader's wise friend
